article.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
article.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

headline: StanChart Eyes 3 Signs of BTC Bottom Tonight

article.title: StanChart looks for 3 signs of BTC bottom, including Strategy’s Monday news
article.summary: Standard Chartered’s Geoff Kendrick tells clients “winter is over” as the analyst said crypto prices have likely seen the low for the cycle, ahead of Strategy’s Bitcoin purchase update.

headline: LNG Tanker Nears Hormuz Amid $10B Reopening Boost

article.title: LNG Tanker Heads Toward Hormuz as Deal Lifts Reopening Hopes
article.summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker that has been trapped in the Persian Gulf for over three months appears to be heading toward the Strait of Hormuz, just as the US and Iran say they have reached a deal to reopen the waterway.

headline: Zimbabwe Requires Crypto Firms to Register Immediately

article.summary: Registration costs an initial $500 with renewal costing $400 a year, and operating without registration is now an offense, according to Reuters.
